channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Oil prices fall after Vance says more than 12 million barrels exit Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Oil declines as Mideast peace prospects rise following U.S.-Iran deal.

item.title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
item.description: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.

item.title: Trump bid to fire Fed's Lisa Cook cost her more than $1M in legal, security costs: Filing
item.description: A financial disclosure from Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook details large legal and security expenses

item.title: Stocks rebound from Fed sell-off as oil prices slide, chip stocks rally: Live updates
item.description: After hitting a fresh intraday all-time high, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ultimately closed more than 500 points lower on Wednesday.

item.title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
item.description: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.

item.title: The charts in this car stock look attractive after months of trading in a range, says Jay Woods
item.description: The chief market strategist at Freedom Capital Markets breaks down the technicals in this automakers.

item.title: SpaceX stock sinks 8%, continuing to cool after three-day rally
item.description: Investor bullishness showed signs of waning on Wednesday, as shares sank 5%.

item.title: Bonkers SpaceX stats that show how staggering the money movement has been
item.description: SpaceX's first few days of trading have been filled with superlatives, from trading volume to the size of the company's first acquisition.

item.title: GOP Rep. Steil pushes bill curbing members of Congress from prediction market betting
item.description: The new proposal on limits on members of Congress making such bets come as scrutiny increases on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket.

item.title: Intel gains 8% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
item.description: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.

item.title: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed
item.description: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.

item.title: Here are the five big takeaways from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chairman
item.description: The Federal Reserve and Chairman Kevin Warsh on Wednesday followed the script on interest rates closely.

item.title: Here are the odds of SpaceX becoming the world's most valuable company
item.description: SpaceX debuted as the fifth-biggest stock. The path to third place could take years, at least according to options prices.

item.title: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
item.description: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.

item.title: Federal regulators back Trump's plan to speed power to energy-hungry AI data centers
item.description: As tech companies and developers welcome faster power supply connections, states and operators worry that the plan would dim their authority.

item.title: There's a little-known tech name on Josh Brown's Best Stocks list that's at the nexus of the data center buildout
item.description: This company's three businesses are on fire, says Josh Brown.

item.title: California’s counting on an IPO tax windfall. Several factors are complicating the equation
item.description: The IPOs of SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic could create a tax windfall for the state of California. But experts say the revenue impact may be blunted.

item.title: Roy Cooper's North Carolina Senate race could help decide control of the next Congress
item.description: North Carolina’s 2026 Senate race pits Democrat Roy Cooper against Republican Michael Whatley in a swing state Democrats haven't won since with Obama in 2008.

item.title: Retirement savers may own SpaceX — or soon will — and not even know it
item.description: Investors who missed the SpaceX IPO may already have exposure to the stock through mutual funds, ETFs or retirement accounts.

item.title: Women have better retirement savings habits but lower 401(k) balances than men, Vanguard finds
item.description: While women tend to save more of their paycheck for retirement, they have lower 401(k) balances due to other factors, including wages that trail men's earnings.

item.title: Apple's upcoming price hikes are good for the company not so good for consumers
item.description: Apple is throwing in the towel, facing down soaring memory and storage chip costs.

item.title: CNBC Select’s weekly mortgage rate snapshot: See your options today
item.description: Here are the mortgage rates are for the week ending June 18, according to Freddie Mac.

item.title: Supreme Court sides with marijuana user stripped of gun rights
item.description: The justices, in 9-0 ruling, upheld a lower court's decision to dismiss an illegal gun possession charge brought under the law at issue against Ali Hemani.

item.title: Obama Center launch brings Democratic political glitterati to Chicago ahead of crucial elections
item.description: Political elites, White House alums, donors and business leaders will converge on Chicago on Thursday to commemorate the launch of the Obama Presidential Center.

item.title: Hollister partners with Target to tap into $89 billion back-to-college shopping market
item.description: Hollister's partnership with Target comes as both companies look to capitalize on the lucrative back-to-college shopping market.

item.title: Nearly 80% of data center capacity is at elevated risk to climate hazards like flooding and fire, study says
item.description: The vast majority of data centers globally face either acute risk from climate change events or chronic risk from ongoing climate issues like extreme heat.

item.title: Hegseth warns NATO allies that some nations will 'fail' U.S. defense review
item.description: The U.S. Defense secretary also said it was "shameful" that European allies refused to give U.S. forces access to bases to strike Iran.

item.title: Pfizer CFO Dave Denton to leave company in August
item.description: Pfizer said on Thursday that finance chief Dave Denton will leave ⁠on August 15 to return to the consumer goods industry.

item.title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
item.description: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.

item.title: SpaceX adds longtime Elon Musk ally Roelof Botha to board
item.description: Roelof Botha, who worked with Elon Musk at PayPal in the dot-com era before becoming a prominent venture capitalist, is joining the SpaceX board.
